name: Li Ren (Dexian)
page_title: Li Ren (Dexian) 李仁 (德賢) [Shu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Li Ren, styled Dexian, was a colleague of Yin Mo. Together they travelled to Nanyang to study under Song Zhong and Sima Hui. Li Ren was widely read in the classics and philosophers and was also an expert in archery, medicine, mechanics, mathematics and divination by numbers.

Li Ren was appointed in the provincial office under Liu Bei, who he later served as royal Secretariat. He died sometime around AD 220. (1)

(1): A Bibliographical Dictionary of the Later Han to Three Kingdoms.

full_text:
Li Ren (Dexian) 李仁 (德賢)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Ren (李仁), styledDexian (德賢), was born in Guanghan. Studied in Nanyang, was widely read and an expert in many fields. Li Ren was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Li Ren lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Li Ren, styled Dexian, was a colleague of Yin Mo. Together they travelled to Nanyang to study under Song Zhong and Sima Hui. Li Ren was widely read in the classics and philosophers and was also an expert in archery, medicine, mechanics, mathematics and divination by numbers.
Li Ren was appointed in the provincial office under Liu Bei, who he later served as royal Secretariat. He died sometime around AD 220. (1)
